positive: A maximalist, central-composition illustration depicting an ethereal blend of deep space and tropical bioluminescence. Focus on intricate, overlapping elements: massive, stylized moonflowers mixed with swirling nebulae patterns, deep purple amethyst tones bleeding into emerald green, and golden constellations forming veins around the botanical structures. The style is highly detailed, neo-tribal mixed with scientific illustration, using sharp, graphic silhouettes and high contrast for maximum apparel print pop. Composition must be balanced and symmetrical, suitable for full-front chest placement. Cinematic lighting, vibrant color palette, clean linework, 4K digital art.
negative: blurry, amateur, out of focus, deformed, text, watermark, logo, signature, grain, cropped, jpeg artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, poor contrast, realistic photography, grayscale
